mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO RDIREVISNLOG_TB Q USING (
SELECT SYSDATE AS REVISN_DT, REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{item.data_dt}, '-', ''), ' ', ''), ':', '') AS DATA_SAVE_DT, (SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = #{item.tag_nm}) AS TAGSN,
null AS OLD_VALUE,
#{item.tag_bfr_vl} AS OLD_VALUE,
#{item.tag_aft_vl} AS LAST_VALUE, #{item.revisn_resn} AS REVISN_RESN, #{item.revisn_remark} AS REVISN_REMARK FROM DUAL
) N ON ( Q.TAGSN = N.TAGSN AND Q.REVISN_DT = N.REVISN_DT AND Q.DATA_SAVE_DT = N.DATA_SAVE_DT ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET Q.OLD_VALUE = N.OLD_VALUE, Q.LAST_VALUE = N.LAST_VALUE, Q.REVISN_RESN = N.REVISN_RESN, Q.REVISN_REMARK = N.REVISN_REMARK WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(REVISN_DT, DATA_SAVE_DT, TAGSN, OLD_VALUE, LAST_VALUE, REVISN_RESN, REVISN_REMARK) VALUES(N.REVISN_DT, N.DATA_SAVE_DT, N.TAGSN, N.OLD_VALUE, N.LAST_VALUE, N.REVISN_RESN, N.REVISN_REMARK)
